title: List Audit Log
content:
# List Audit Log

List Audit Log

## Endpoint

`GET /instance/auditlog/list`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.instance.listInstanceAuditLogs()
print(response)

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `action`. The filter is on the full name only.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `user_id`. The filter is on the full name only.

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `namespace`. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters. If set, it will override acp_name

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `identifier`. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters. If set, it will override acp_name

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `username`. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters. If set, it will override acp_name

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `request_id`. The filter is on the full name only.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search Audit Logs by key `action`, `username` or `namespace`. All values in array will be filtered as `OR`. The search is case insensitive and will find partial matches as well.

parameters.name: from_date_time
parameters.description: Filter actions that occurred at or after this UTC time, formatted in RFC 3339.

parameters.name: to_date_time
parameters.description: Filter actions that occurred until or at this UTC time, formatted in RFC 3339.
